name: Wood Engrave - Standard
notes: Good all-round setting for plywood and basswood engraving.

name: Wood Cut - 3mm
notes: Reliable cut for 3mm birch. Use air assist.

name: Acrylic Cut - 3mm
notes: Slow and steady. Remove protective film after.

name: Slate Photo Engrave
notes: Stucchi dithering, gamma 1.8. Excellent results on dark slate.

name: Leather Mark
notes: Test on scrap first. Genuine leather only.

name: Cork Score & Snap
notes: Score line for clean snapping rather than cutting through.

name: Ceramic Paint Engrave
notes: Black spray coat first. Laser removes paint. Wipe clean after.

name: Fill - Dark Wood
notes: Fill mode for solid dark areas. Good for logos.

name: Photo - Jarvis Dither
notes: Jarvis dithering, gamma 2.0. Good for portraits on wood.
